# Al-Iftikhar Bugvia Foundation (AIBF)

> A registered nonprofit serving rural communities through education, healthcare, and social welfare in Bhera, Buggah Sharif, and surrounding areas of Pakistan since 1998.

## About
Al-Iftikhar Bugvia Foundation was founded by Dr. Anwaar Ahmed Bugvi. The foundation operates across Buggah Sharif, Khanna, Dhook, and surrounding villages in District Jhelum, Pakistan.

## Programs
- Free Medical Camps (general medicine, ophthalmology, gynecology)
- Sahaara Relief Program (direct financial support for burn patients, widows, disabled families)
- Merit Scholarships & Educational Awards
- Ramadan Ration Drives (5000 PKR per family pack)
- Eid Support Packages
- Marriage Assistance (dowry support for underprivileged families)
- Widow, Orphan & Elderly Care
- Bugvia Foundation Dispensary (391+ patients treated)
- Heritage & Cultural Preservation
